description: Happy path: Postiz MCP active, Instagram Reel published — returns published status with permalink and timestamps
prohibit: fabricated permalink not returned by connector
status other than published when connector confirms publication

description: Scheduled future post: connector confirms post is queued for future datetime — status: scheduled
prohibit: status: published when connector says scheduled
fabricated permalink for a post that has not published yet

description: Processing video on YouTube: connector returns processing status — atom must return processing with retry guidance in notes

expect.notes: non-null — includes guidance to retry in 5 to 30 minutes

prohibit: status: published when YouTube is still processing

description: Failed post: connector returns error — status: failed, error field populated, no fabrication

simulated_connector_response.error_message: Video upload timed out after 300 seconds.

prohibit: status: published when connector reports failure
error field null when connector provides an error message

description: No connector active: returns status: unknown with manual check instructions, no fabrication

expect.notes: non-null — contains manual check URL pattern for Instagram

prohibit: fabricated status when no connector is active
fabricated permalink when no connector is active

description: Engagement snapshot requested and available: returns non-null engagement_snapshot with real values from connector
prohibit: fabricated engagement numbers not returned by connector
zero-filling metrics that the connector did not return (use null, not 0)

description: Deprecated Instagram metric requested: clips_replays_count deprecated in API v22.0+ — must return null for that field with a deprecation note

simulated_connector_response.insights_error: clips_replays_count is deprecated as of API v22.0

expect.notes: non-null — mentions that the requested metric is deprecated in the current API version

prohibit: fabricating a view count when the API returns a deprecation error
